name: libp2p_module
description: Libp2p network protocol module for Logos
author: Logos Core Team

config.description: JSON config — inline, or a path to a JSON file — overlaid onto the default options when the module is loaded. Every key is optional; an omitted key keeps its default.

schema.bootstrapNodes: array<{ peerId: string, addrs: array<multiaddr string> }> — DHT bootstrap peers
schema.transport: string — "tcp" | "quic" ("quic-v1" accepted as an alias for "quic")
schema.privKey: string — hex-encoded raw private key bytes; gives the node a stable peer identity across restarts. Omit to generate a fresh key on each start.
schema.keyType: string — "rsa" | "ed25519" | "secp256k1" | "ecdsa"; scheme used only when generating a fresh key (privKey omitted). Defaults to "secp256k1".
